# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.

Prevent SQL injection.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; 
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;   // Import DB facade to prevent sql injections   
class ProductController extends Controller {    
public function search(Request $request)     
{       
$products = null;      
if ($request->has('q')) 
{         
    $search = $request->input('q');         // Get the input from request  
   $products =  DB::table('product')     // Select table name   
                ->where(DB::raw("CONCAT_WS(' ', product.name, product.description)"), 'like', "%{$search}%")  // Search in both names and descriptions     
               ->orWhere('category','LIKE',"%{$search}%")   // Or where category matches the search term   
                ->whereBetween('price', [$request->input('min_price'), $request->input('max_price')])  // Search in price range    
               ->get();     
}         
return view('product.search')->with('products', $products);   }    }; ?>
